name: Priyanka and Nitya's Boat trip
description:
Priyanka Rao had been looking forward to this vacation for months—a rare escape from the routines of home, work, and city life.

She and her family had arrived in the Bahamas just the day before, trading the noise and crowds of the city for swaying palms and white sand beaches.

But as always, the family had split the moment they unpacked. Her husband and teenage son were eager to dive into the resort’s amenities—snorkeling, drinks by the pool, and all-you-can-eat buffets.

Priyanka, however, craved something quieter. Something different.

So she and her daughter, Nitya, decided to wander off on their own for the day. Nitya had been acting out the past few days.. yelling during phone calls and even checking her boyfriends social's every thirty minutes.

She was so distracted that she forgot to pack swimsuits for the both of them.. Priyanka had to make a last minute purchases at the airport for the both of them.

Unfortunatly, both mother and daughter could only get swimsuits that were either too revealing, or too tight.

Well no matter! Today they were going to have fun! No matter what!

It wasn’t long before they found themselves at the resort’s front desk, asking if there were any private boat services that could take them out along the coast.

The receptionist had pointed them down a winding path toward the beach, mentioning a local boat owner who might be available.

The two shrug and make their way to the boat owner.. after all whats the worst that could happen?
creator: Marathi_Mama
